title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Pune University - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Pune University - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pune University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Coimbatore-based team.

About Pune University:
Pune University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pune University!
